'''pangate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wonderfully|wonderfully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wonderfully|wonderfully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pangate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pangate|pangate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pangatesher|pangatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangatesherĂ«m|pangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pangatero|pangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pangateshĂ«|pangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangateshĂ«m|pangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipangatero|gokipangatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipangateshĂ«|gokipangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipangateshĂ«m|gokipangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopangankerom|gopangankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopangankeshĂ«|gopangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopangankeshĂ«m|gopangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopangankeya|gopangankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pangaterom|pangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangatemu|pangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pangateya|pangateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipangaterom|gokipangaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipangatemu|gokipangatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipangateya|gokipangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pangangate|pangangate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pangangatesher|pangangatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangangatesherĂ«m|pangangatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pangangatero|pangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pangangateshĂ«|pangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangangateshĂ«m|pangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipangangatero|gokipangangatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipangangateshĂ«|gokipangangateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipangangateshĂ«m|gokipangangateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopangangankerom|gopangangankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopangangankeshĂ«|gopangangankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopangangankeshĂ«m|gopangangankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopangangankeya|gopangangankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pangangaterom|pangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangangatemu|pangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pangangateya|pangangateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipangangaterom|gokipangangaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipangangatemu|gokipangangatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipangangateya|gokipangangateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠte|pĂŠngĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠtesher|pĂŠngĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠngĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠtero|pĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠngĂŠtero|gokipĂŠngĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠngĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠngĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠngĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠngĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠngĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠngĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠterom|pĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠtemu|pĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠngĂŠteya|pĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠngĂŠterom|gokipĂŠngĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠngĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠngĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠngĂŠteya|gokipĂŠngĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafngafte|pafngafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafngaftesher|pafngaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafngaftesherĂ«m|pafngaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafngaftero|pafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafngafteshĂ«|pafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafngafteshĂ«m|pafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafngaftero|gokipafngaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafngafteshĂ«|gokipafngafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafngafteshĂ«m|gokipafngafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafngafnkerom|gopafngafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafngafnkeshĂ«|gopafngafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafngafnkeshĂ«m|gopafngafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafngafnkeya|gopafngafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafngafterom|pafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafngaftemu|pafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafngafteya|pafngafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafngafterom|gokipafngafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafngaftemu|gokipafngaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafngafteya|gokipafngafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
